_comment_1: Sample twin pairs for eval-recommender.ts. Dan curates the real 20 pairs.
_comment_2: Brand and name must exactly match public.fragrances rows (case-sensitive). If a pair does not resolve, it is logged and skipped -- the run still produces signal from the rest.
_comment_3: A 'twin' is a pair where BOTH directions should surface each other: same-house flankers, notorious dupes, olfactory cousins. See scripts/eval-recommender.ts header for the curation philosophy.

pairs.note: Placeholder -- same-house flanker, should land top-5
